response.justification: Candidate's primary expertise is in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and full-stack web development, not C++. Only documented C++ experience is roughly 6 months at National Instruments (2000-2001) and a bachelor thesis project — far short of the 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows required. C++ is not even listed in the skills section. No SQL Server/Oracle exposure, no Windows platform focus, and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background. Despite a long and varied career, the core mandatory requirements are not met.
strengths: Long engineering career with breadth across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
Demonstrated communication ability through workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: Minimal C++ experience (~6 months professional, plus thesis); not in declared skill set
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
Zero exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains
